title: The Witcher 3 Music
description: Replaces vanilla background music with a selection of tracks from The Witcher 3 soundtrack
body:
_The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt_ has some of the best music ever produced for a video game. So in my quest to make the perfect fantasy setting for my world, I decided to add the Witcher flair!

This resource pack swaps out most of the vanilla background music with selected tracks from The Witcher 3. This includes tracks from the Hearts of Stone and Blood and Wine DLCs!
Each track was specifically chosen to fit the vibe of walking around the over-world in a fantasy setting. Currently, nether and creative tracks have not been altered. A special surprise has been thrown in for the End Dragon fight though :3

This pack is at its best when used with mods that shorten or remove the delay between music tracks!

Future Plans:
- Updating to 1.21.x
- Adding new music for both the nether and creative mode
- Support for mods like Reactive Music and Biome Music
- Add various iconic SFX from the game

_All credits go to CD Projekt RED and the associated artist. The resource pack creator makes no claim to the contained music. Please see track and artist names within the files._
